summary: POTUS retweet of the WhiteHouse video: a polished, movie-trailer-style cinematic montage of Trump's visit to China's Temple of Heaven, set entirely to music (transcript: 'Music', music_score 0.86). It strings together artful low-angle architecture shots, a dramatic backlit doorway silhouette of Trump, Xi and Melania, a slow-motion close-up of feet crossing the courtyard, ornate ceilings, and a slow-mo hero walking shot with stylized name graphics. The prestige-cinema treatment glorifies Trump as a world statesman and is a produced spectacle, not raw footage.

script.scene: Low-angle hero shot of the blue-and-gold tiered roof of the Temple of Heaven against an overcast sky, color graded cool and cinematic. Music only.
Dramatic silhouette/backlit shot framed through a dark temple doorway: Trump, Xi Jinping and Melania (with aides) walk toward camera out of the bright courtyard beyond.
Slow-motion ground-level close-up of the delegation's feet and legs walking across the worn stone courtyard, sunlight glinting off polished shoes.
Tilting interior shot looking up at the richly painted, gilded temple ceiling beams and red columns.

Slow-motion wide hero shot of Trump, Melania, Xi and Eric Trump walking abreast across the plaza flanked by security, with stylized white lower-third graphic text reading 'PRESIDENT DONALD ... TRUMP.'

notable_text: PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP (on-screen lower third); tweet (RT @WhiteHouse): 'President Donald J. Trump Visits China's Temple of Heaven.'
